things.name: Piazza dei Signori
things.description: Elegant medieval square with the Palazzo dei Trecento loggia and Torre Civica

things.name: Cathedral of San Pietro
things.description: Romanesque-Renaissance cathedral with Titian's Annunciation and remarkable crypt

things.name: Calmaggiore
things.description: Charming porticoed shopping street connecting the cathedral to Piazza dei Signori

things.name: Medieval Walls & Canals
things.description: Picturesque 16th-century walls and canals with watermill giving Treviso its character

things.name: Fishmarket Island (Pescheria)
things.description: Historic fish market island in the middle of the Cagnano canal

things.name: Museo di Santa Caterina
things.description: 14th-century monastery complex with Tomaso da Modena's remarkable fresco cycle

things.name: Museo Bailo
things.description: Civic art museum with works by Arturo Martini and local 19th-century painters

things.name: Prosecco Road
things.description: UNESCO-listed wine route through the hills of Conegliano-Valdobbiadene nearby

things.name: Buranelli Canal
things.description: Most photographed canal in Treviso with colourful reflected facades

things.name: Treviso Craft Beer Scene
things.description: Capital of Italian craft beer with dozens of artisan breweries in and around the city
